'''''InQuest Gamer'' 145''' was a CCG and roleplaying magazine published by [[Wizard Entertainment]]. It featured a [[Star Wars Miniatures|SW Minis]] Killer Squad by [[Sterling Hershey]], made up of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].
